  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  Library and executable for calculating dvdids as returned by Windows'
  IDvdInfo2::GetDiscID.
  
  WWW:    http://www.srcf.ucam.org/~cjk32/dvdid/
  
  PR:             138873
  Submitted by:   Christopher Key <cjk32@cam.ac.uk>
